lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

Step into luxury with this absolutely flawless vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and driving just like new. Meticulously cared for and kept in pristine shape, this is a rare opportunity to own a top-tier car that has been maintained to the highest possible standard.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several minor scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows visible wear from regular use, including some fading on the seats. The car is functional and drives, though it has high mileage and will require standard maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission function properly. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear, including small scratches and paint chips. The interior is clean with some light wear on the seats. All electronic features are fully operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows signs of regular use over the years. Mechanically, the car is functional and reliable for daily driving, though the engine could benefit from a tune-up to address a minor rough idle. The transmission shifts adequately, though it isn't as crisp as a newer model. Visually, the exterior has several noticeable scratches and small dings consistent with its age, and the interior upholstery shows visible wear and some minor staining. The air conditioning is functional but takes a moment to cool the cabin. This car is a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable vehicle at a lower price point who doesn't mind some cosmetic imperfections and minor maintenance needs.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained, making it a reliable and comfortable choice for its next owner. The engine starts promptly and runs smoothly, while the transmission provides seamless shifts. On the exterior, the paint retains a healthy gloss, though there are minor imperfections such as small stone chips on the front fascia and a few light surface scratches consistent with regular use. The interior is clean and well-preserved, with only minor wear visible on the driver’s seat bolster and floor mats. All power features, air conditioning, and safety systems are in proper working order. It comes with a documented service history, showing regular oil changes and recent brake maintenance. This car is ready for the road and represents a solid value for someone seeking a dependable vehicle that has been cared for properly.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical integrity, this unit represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver. Its refined presentation and robust operational status ensure it remains a premier selection within its class, providing both aesthetic appeal and proven durability.

Hey there! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to own! It’s in solid shape, super reliable, and ready for its next adventure with you. It looks great and drives even better—perfect for anyone looking for a dependable car without the 'new car' price tag. Shoot me a message if you want to come see it!
This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained sedan represents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking both reliability and style. Finished in a timeless metallic silver, the exterior retains a brilliant shine, showing only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium charcoal leather upholstery is free of tears, and all electronic features—including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and a brand-new set of all-season tires. It has been garaged throughout its life and has a smoke-free, pet-free history. While it carries the character of a pre-loved vehicle, its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal make it a standout choice for those who value quality and peace of mind on the road.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience that commands presence on the road.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of mechanical reliability and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a rigorous inspection process, this specimen demonstrates consistent performance and reflects the diligent care of its previous ownership. The interior remains refined and well-appointed, while the exterior maintains a professional appearance suitable for the discerning driver. This offering represents a premier selection for those prioritizing long-term value and proven engineering.

Hey there! If you’re looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved, you’ve found it! This beauty is in great shape and runs like a dream. It’s been my trusty companion for a while now, and it’s still got plenty of adventures left in it. Perfect for zipping around town or hitting the open road. Come check it out and see for yourself—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip and driver engagement. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers to maintain its legendary handling characteristics. Finished in Alpine White over a driver-centric cockpit, this chassis offers a pure analog experience with the reliability of a well-documented service history.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable performance. Inspect in person.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and comfort. The exterior retains a vibrant finish with only minor signs of careful use, while the smoke-free interior features well-preserved upholstery and a fully functional suite of modern tech. Mechanically, it is robust and dependable, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. It handles beautifully on the highway and remains quiet in the city. If you are looking for a reliable, high-quality driver that has been treated with respect by a detail-oriented owner, this car is ready for your next adventure.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained to rigorous standards, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal remain commendable, ensuring long-term value and operational excellence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent care and reliable mechanical integrity, it offers an exceptional balance of performance and value. We invite you to experience the refined engineering and sophisticated presence of this well-preserved example.

Hey friend! Looking for a reliable ride that's been treated with love? You've found it! This beauty is in wonderful shape and drives like a dream. It's super dependable and ready for its next adventure with you. It’s been well-maintained and is honestly a joy to drive. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,000 RPM redline via its individual throttle bodies. This example is equipped with the desirable 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement, addressing the chassis’s known weak points. The suspension retains its communicative feedback with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical integrity remains sharp, offering an engaging driving experience with precise turn-in and the signature metallic rasp of the M-tuned exhaust.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of performance and reliability. The exterior finish retains a brilliant luster, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium seating is supple and free of significant wear, while all technological features, including the climate control and infotainment system, operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is sound, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and a recent multi-point inspection. It drives smoothly on a well-treaded set of tires, providing a quiet and confident experience on the road. A complete set of service records is available for your review, confirming its excellent upkeep.

This exceptional vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained to ensure mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by responsive handling and a well-preserved interior. Prospective owners will appreciate the consistent upkeep and high aesthetic standards maintained throughout its tenure. This is a distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking reliable quality and sophisticated presentation.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated design. Having undergone a comprehensive inspection, this unit remains in commendable condition, offering a premium driving experience at a competitive market valuation. A distinguished choice for those who prioritize both performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it a super dependable choice for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs great and looks sharp! I’m looking to find it a good new home, so come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically sorted, it benefits from a recently serviced VANOS system and reinforced rear subframe mounting points to ensure optimal chassis rigidity. The factory limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction, complemented by a suspension setup that maintains sharp turn-in and predictable damping. Finished in Carbon Black, the exterior shows minor road wear consistent with spirited use, while the interior remains a driver-focused cockpit with solid bolster integrity. A high-revving masterpiece engineered for the purist.
Used car. Good condition. Recent maintenance complete. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle is a remarkable example of pride in ownership, maintained with a meticulous eye for detail. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, accented by clean lines and well-preserved trim, though minor road wear consistent with careful use is present. Inside, the cabin offers a pristine environment with supple seating, a smoke-free atmosphere, and all electronic features—from the climate control to the premium sound system—functioning exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has benefited from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule, resulting in a smooth, responsive driving experience, crisp gear shifts, and a quiet, confident engine. Complete with a documented service history and recent professional detailing, this car represents a perfect balance of aesthetic appeal and mechanical reliability for the discerning driver.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and driver comfort. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking dependable performance and sophisticated styling.
